content.rendered:
Attendo’s Sticky Notes aren’t just another digital notepad — they’re your personal reminder buddy. Jot down ideas, mark what’s urgent, and find everything the moment you need it. Simple, quick, and surprisingly helpful when your day gets busy.

Key Functionalities:

Priority-Based Organization: Don’t just list tasks—rank them. Assign a Priority Level (High, Medium, or Low) to every note. Visual badges (like the “High” red badge or “Low” yellow badge) help you instantly spot what needs immediate attention.

Advanced Search & Filtering: Never lose track of a reminder. The robust filter bar allows you to:

  • Search by Keyword: Type to find specific notes instantly.
  • Filter by Date: Retrieve notes from a specific day.
  • Filter by Priority: Isolate just your “High Priority” tasks for the day.

Quick-Create Sidebar: The dedicated “Create Sticky Note” panel on the right allows for rapid entry. simply enter a Title, select a Priority, add a Description, and hit Submit Now.

Date-Stamped Records: Every note is automatically stamped with the creation date (e.g., 12/12/2025), acting as a personal timeline of your activities and reminders.

Full Control (Edit & Delete): Mistakes happen, and plans change. Each note card comes with intuitive Edit (pencil icon) and Delete (trash bin icon) buttons, giving you full control over your list.

How It Works

  1. Access: Click the Note icon in the top header to view your dashboard.
  2. Create: Use the right-hand panel to title your task (e.g., “Payroll Review”), set the priority to High, and add details.
  3. Manage: View your notes in a clean, card-based grid layout. Use the search bar to find old notes or filter by “High Priority” to start your day effectively.
